original text:
Description:Zegaloth Offensive is a flash shooter game where you must defeat the Zegaloth Engineering Strike Team before they disable the beseiged planets generators.
Instructions:Aim the crosshairs at the alien engineers as they cross the battlefield, hold the mouse button to fire your sonic rifle. Do not let any vehicles, engineers, or probes cross the battlefield. Destroy 200 to win the game.
